3107310.name: Baking Bad
3107310.description:
In a world where sweets and carbs are banned, you’ve taken your baking underground. Build and upgrade your RV kitchen, bake forbidden treats, sell them across cities, manage your blood sugar, and stay one step ahead of the law. Play solo or team up with friends to grow your underground baking empire.

Cook & Drive

Bake forbidden treats in your custom RV kitchen. Combine any ingredients to craft unique pastries, upgrade your baking gear, and hit the road to sell your creations across cities—always one step ahead of the law.

Sell

Deal to eager buyers known as “chunkies” while avoiding police patrols. Manage your reputation and keep your operation under wraps—one bad deal could expose everything.

Evade

When the heat rises, jump behind the wheel and outrun the authorities in high-speed chases. Stay sharp, stay mobile, and stay free.

Blood Sugar

You started baking to afford your medication—don’t forget to take it. Manage your blood sugar to survive long enough to make your fortune.

Spend and Expand

Reinvest your profits to upgrade your RV, unlock new equipment, or gamble for extra advantages.

Multiplayer or Solo

Play solo or team up with friends to expand your dessert empire and become the most notorious sugar syndicate on the road.

Disclaimer: Baking Bad is an original work of fiction and an independent intellectual property. All characters, storylines, and themes are the creation of Funky Armor. This game is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any existing television series, film, or other copyrighted property. Any similarities to other fictional works are purely coincidental.
